source_pr.title: statistics: add more tests for extended stats
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:

### What problem does this PR solve?

Not a problem, add more unit tests for extended stats feature.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

No code change.


### Related changes

N/A

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

- Unit test
- No code

Side effects

N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- N/A

symptoms: rows = tk.MustQuery("select table_id, stats from mysql.stats_extended where name = 's1' order by stats").Rows() (statistics/handle/handle_test.go)
